dashboardDescription: Auto-generated by the Amplitude Wizard. Charts are tied to the events instrumented on 2026-04-17. Autocapture charts will populate immediately; custom event charts populate once users trigger those flows.
note: Dashboard creation via API requires a secret key. Create manually in Amplitude using the chart plan below.
manualCreationSteps: Go to https://app.amplitude.com → Dashboards → Create Dashboard → name it 'Pulse Analytics — 2026' → add the charts below.

charts.title: Top Pages by Traffic
charts.note: Autocapture — populates immediately on first visit

charts.title: Article Click Volume (Daily)
charts.note: Shows which source types (blog, reddit, newsletter…) drive the most engagement

charts.title: Content Engagement Funnel
charts.note: Measures how many visitors go from landing to clicking an article to digging into sources

charts.title: Subscription Conversion Funnel
charts.note: Primary conversion funnel — measures visitor → reader → subscriber

charts.title: Newsletter Subscriptions (Daily)
charts.note: Primary KPI — track subscription growth over time

charts.title: Video & Podcast Clicks
charts.note: Breaks down podcast vs video engagement; informs content mix decisions

charts.title: Try Prompt Clicks by Duration
charts.note: Shows which effort-level prompts readers act on (5 min vs 30 min vs afternoon)

charts.title: Reader Retention (Weekly)
charts.note: Activation = first page view. Return = clicking an article. Measures habitual readership.
